control.description-key: Advanced slide-out glassmorphism panel with fluid CSS animations, dynamic content zones, and configurable blur/tint/direction.

property.name: isOpen
property.description-key: Bind to a Two Options field to control panel open/close state.

property.name: panelTitle
property.description-key: Title displayed at the top of the slide-out panel.

property.name: slideDirection
property.description-key: Direction the panel slides from: left, right, top, bottom.

property.name: tintColor
property.description-key: Background tint color in rgba format (default: rgba(255,255,255,0.15)).

property.name: panelSize
property.description-key: Panel width (for left/right) or height (for top/bottom) in px or % (default: 400px).

property.name: contentZones
property.description-key: JSON array defining dynamic content zones: [{title, body, icon}].
